title: Indulgent Smoky Venezuelan Tomatoes Stew
description: A rich, smoky stew featuring baby plum tomatoes simmered in a kazan cauldron, infused with Iberian-inspired spices and a hint of liquid smoke for depth.
instructions: Heat the kazan cauldron over medium heat and drizzle olive oil until shimmering.
Add diced onion and minced garlic to the cauldron and sauté until translucent.
Stir in smoked paprika, cumin, oregano, salt, and pepper, cooking for 1 minute to bloom the spices.
Incorporate the baby plum tomato halves, tomato paste, and vegetable broth, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, cover, and let cook for 20 minutes, allowing the tomatoes to soften and absorb flavors.
After 20 minutes, remove the lid and add a splash of liquid smoke to deepen the smoky profile.
Continue simmering for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the stew thickens slightly.
Stir in fresh basil just before serving and adjust seasoning if needed.
